data.title: Think XRP Is ‘Crashing’? Analyst Says You Deserve A Slap!
data.description:
XRP has recently witnessed a notable decline, slipping by 5% over the past week. The altcoin dropped below key levels of $2.40 and $2.45, raising concerns among investors. However, a market analyst believes this price shift is not a sign of a crash but rather part of a bullish ascending triangle formation. Related Reading: Cardano Soars Nearly 130% To $30 Billion, Climbs To 9th In Market Cap...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/think-xrp-is-crashing-analyst-says-you-deserve-a-slap/

data.title: Spot gold hits new highs as trade risks continue to increase gold's appeal
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Driven by safe-haven demand, gold futures rose to near-record highs (the all-time high of $2,968.50 set on February 11). Spot gold has just hit a record high of $2,946.50. ANZ Research analysts said in a report that gold prices rose as the market focus returned to the uncertain economic backdrop. The risk of a full-scale trade war is high, which has stimulated investor demand for safe-haven assets such as gold. (Jinshi)

data.title: Robinhood Crypto Vice President: The platform is relatively strict about listing, mainly considering security and liquidity
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Johann Kerbrat, Vice President of Robinhood Crypto Business, talked about Robinhood's listing standards in Consensus Hong Kong 2025 today.
Johann Kerbrat said that Robinhood's listing process is relatively strict. The platform currently only supports 22 assets. In our listing process, the focus of our discussion is the security and liquidity of the assets. Can we provide them to customers safely? Can we provide sufficient liquidity? Can we provide suitable quotes?
When talking about issues related to meme tokens, Johann Kerbrat also said that many people are discussing meme tokens, but they ignore that other assets are also being used in large quantities. For example, we see many people buying Ethereum or Solana and seeing the strong adoption of stablecoins in institutions. In my opinion, although it is always exciting to talk about the latest meme tokens, we cannot ignore the real adoption of the technology behind them.

data.title: Strategist: Inflationary pressures remain, Bank of England should be cautious about cutting interest rates
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Raymond James Investment Services strategist Bartstone-Carr said that while the Bank of England may want to view rising inflation as a temporary phenomenon, data in January showed that the inflation rate rose to 3.0%, suggesting that it may take some time to cut the base rate again. The key question facing the central bank's Monetary Policy Committee is how long these price pressures will last. The Bank of England voted unanimously in favor of a rate cut two weeks ago, but since then its chief economist Peel has been warning against a hasty rate cut despite weak economic activity. "Today's data proves that the Bank of England is right to be firm in its commitment to gradual easing of policy." (Jinshi)

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Clarifies Ethereum Foundation Board Position
data.description: According to Odaily, Vitalik Buterin has addressed misconceptions regarding his role within the Ethereum Foundation (EF) board. He clarified that claims of him holding 3 out of 5 seats on the board are inaccurate. Buterin stated that since 2017, he has held only one seat on a three-member board.

data.title: Solana Foundation President: I hope to make "boring" things interesting again in 2025, such as stablecoins
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Solana Foundation President Lily Liu said today at Consensus Hong Kong 2025 that this was obviously a very bad incident and it should not happen again. Due to the lack of regulatory clarity, actual financial innovation has been hindered, which has led many participants to believe that the products in the cryptocurrency industry have no real value, thus attracting more extreme speculators. The emergence of such malicious incidents is actually a secondary effect caused by the lack of structural product innovation channels in the market.
Lily Liu also mentioned that sniping and insider trading activities can be reduced through innovative price discovery mechanisms and governance systems.
Lily Liu also said that in 2025, Solana hopes to make "boring" things interesting again, such as stablecoins. Stablecoins are the underlying assets for payments, transactions, and all financial transactions, and are the entry point for introducing the existing financial system into the on-chain economy. We firmly believe that blockchain is the infrastructure of the Internet capital market and can support the construction of various financial applications.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-19)
data.description:

data.title: Smart money made $112,500 trading Binance Alpha tokens within seconds of announcement
WisdomTree Launches New ETP Offering Exposure To Digital Assets
data.description: According to Foresight News, CoinDesk reports that WisdomTree has introduced a new exchange-traded product (ETP) at Consensus Hong Kong. The product, named WisdomTree's Physical CoinDesk 20 ETP (WCRP), provides exposure to the digital assets listed in the CoinDesk 20. WCRP is available on Deutsche Börse Xetra, the Swiss Exchange SIX, and the Euronext exchanges in Paris and Amsterdam. Additionally, WCRP generates staking yields, allowing investors to benefit from the rewards obtained by securing the underlying blockchain networks.

data.title: Vitalik: He has a seat on the three-member board of directors of the Ethereum Foundation since 2017
data.description: Vitalik Buterin said that the statement that he holds 3/5 seats on the Ethereum Foundation (EF) board of directors is not accurate. He clarified that he has only held one seat on the three-member board since 2017.
